meaning: vi.辩护,恳求vt.为...辩护,借口,托称
examples: They will plead with him to pull back from confrontation.
They hired a top lawyer to plead their case.
He appeared before the committee to plead his case.
Mr Frederiksen was not asked to plead at his first court hearing on Monday.
At a hearing in May, Hasan told Osborn that he wanted to plead guilty.
